# A New Hope

Exercises every Obsidian **property type**: text, list, number, checkbox, date,
datetime. `title` becomes the banner headline; `tags` and `aliases` become chip
rows; `watched`/`publish` become status badges; `year`, `rating`, dates land in
the details grid.
